meaning: n.搴曞湡,涓嬪眰鍦熷￥鍦板熀
examples: There is a broad substratum of truth in it.
The settlement of pile top in pile foundationconsists of pile compression and settlement of substratum.
After cable duct construction, the Permit Holder shall reinstate the affected stream bed of Ho Chung River to its original conditions using natural substratum.
